code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

type TxError =
  | Overdraft

fn deposit(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Account
  acc.copy(balance: acc.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ acc: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > acc.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(acc.copy(balance: acc.balance - amount))
  end
end

let a0 = Account(balance: 100)
let a1 = deposit(a0, 50)

mut current = a1
mut last_status = "ok"

match withdraw(current, 30)
when Ok(next)
  current = next
  last_status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  last_status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(current, 500)
when Ok(next)
  current = next
  last_status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  last_status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{current.balance}")
println("last_status=#{last_status}")
